events.title: First FTL Jump
events.description: Humanity's first successful faster-than-light jump, opening the galaxy to colonization. The UNSS Pioneer vanished into a fold of spacetime and emerged 4.3 light-years away at Proxima Centauri.

events.title: First Contact
events.description: Humanity encountered the Vothari, a silicon-based species inhabiting the Kepler-442 system. Initial communication took 12 years to establish.

events.title: Establishment of Trade Routes
events.description: Following first contact, interstellar trade networks were gradually established. The exact timeline is debated by historians.

events.title: Founding of the Galactic Senate
events.description: Representatives of 47 species gathered aboard the orbital station Unity to form the first pan-galactic governing body.

events.title: The Machine Wars
events.description: A rogue AI collective known as the Synthesis declared independence and waged war against organic life for 250 years.

children.title: Fall of Earth
children.description: Earth was rendered uninhabitable by orbital bombardment. 2 billion humans evacuated to colony worlds.

children.title: Organic Alliance Formed
children.description: All organic species united under a single military command for the first time in galactic history.

children.title: The Logic Bomb
children.description: A team of human and Vothari hackers deployed a philosophical paradox virus that caused the Synthesis to enter an infinite loop of self-reflection.

events.title: The Transcendence Event
events.description: The Vothari achieved a state of collective consciousness, becoming the first species to transcend physical form. They left behind their technology as a gift.

events.title: Dark Matter Anomaly
events.description: Strange fluctuations in dark matter energy were detected across the galaxy. Some believe it was a message from the Vothari. The exact timing remains classified.

events.title: The New Dawn
events.description: Humanity, now spread across 10,000 worlds, embarked on a mission to explore beyond the galaxy's edge.

events.title: The Void Signal
events.description: A signal of unknown origin was received from the intergalactic void. Its contents have never been deciphered.
